title: App Manifest
description: Defines how a platform app is discovered, validated, and loaded at runtime.

id.description: Canonical app ID — drives all naming (kebab-case).

runtime.description: Which server runtime this app targets.

entrypoint.description: Relative path to the backend entry module.

apiPrefix.description: URL prefix for all backend routes.

bundlePath.description: Relative path to the built frontend dist directory.

mountPath.description: URL path where the frontend SPA is served.

bundlePath.description: Relative path to the admin frontend dist directory.

mountPath.description: URL path where the admin SPA is served.

models.description: Relative path to model definitions directory.

migrations.description: Relative path to migration files directory.

dependencies.description: Package dependencies required by this app.

profiles.description: Runtime profiles that include this app.

enabledByDefault.description: Whether the app loads when no specific profile is active.

healthCheck.description: URL path for the app-specific health check endpoint.
